[FALLBACK] Recent news Item #2 regarding events for ssc difficulty?
Find the odd one out among the following numbers: 25, 36, 16, 82
questions.explanation: 16, 25, and 36 are perfect squares. 82 is not a perfect square.
questions.trick: Memorize squares up to 30 to instantly spot discrepancies.

questions.question: Which is the longest river in the world?
Who was the first President of India?
What will be the Simple Interest on a principal amount of Rs. 9200 at an interest rate of 9% per annum over 3 years?
If DOG is coded as EPH, how will MAN be coded in that same language?
questions.explanation: Each letter is shifted forward by exactly 1 positions in the English alphabet.
questions.trick: Note the position gap between the first letter of the word and the first letter of its code.

questions.question: Find the next number in the series: 3, 9, 27, 81, ?
questions.explanation: The series follows a Geometric Progression with a constant multiplier ratio of 3. So, 81 * 3 = 243.
questions.trick: If numbers scale up very quickly, look for multiplication rather than addition.

questions.question: [FALLBACK] Recent news Item #4 regarding events for ssc difficulty?
A train travels at an average speed of 109 km/hr. How much distance will it cover in 2 hours?
questions.trick: Basic multiplication rule: D = S * T.

questions.question: [FALLBACK] Recent news Item #5 regarding events for ssc difficulty?
What is the average of the following 5 consecutive even numbers: 46, 48, 50, 52, 54?
questions.trick: For a consecutive arithmetic sequence, the average is simply the exact middle term.

questions.question:
Statements:
1. All Apples are Fruits.
2. All Fruits are Foods.

Which conclusion logically follows?
questions.explanation: If A is a subset of B, and B is a subset of C, then A must be a subset of C completely.
questions.trick: Draw a venn diagram: Small circle A inside Medium B inside Large C.

questions.question: [FALLBACK] Recent news Item #3 regarding events for ssc difficulty?
Which is the largest planet in our solar system?
Who wrote the national anthem of India?
If an article is bought for Rs. 1680 and sold at a profit of 30%, what is the selling price?
questions.trick: Calculate 10% of CP, multiply, and add it conceptually.
